findings.description: 経営者 translated inconsistently across 4 occurrences: 'managers' (p312::2), 'executives' (p312::3), 'the manager' (p313::1), 'Manager' (p316 q-choice). In J-SOX / ITパスポート context 経営者 = top executive / executive management, not middle manager. 'the manager' is the most problematic: implies single middle-level manager rather than executive responsibility.
findings.correction_suggestion: Standardise to 'executive management' or 'management (executives)' across all occurrences; or at minimum unify to 'executives' which is used in p312::3.

findings.description: Same section title 数値の数え方 (section 09-01) carries two different English translations: p318 = 'How to Count Numerical Values', p321 = 'How to Count Numbers'. jp and zh are identical on both pages. Inconsistent section heading will confuse readers navigating by English headings.
findings.correction_suggestion: Unify to one form. 'How to Count Numerical Values' is more precise for the content (number system comparison); alternatively 'Number Representation Methods' better reflects the content.

findings.description: Pipeline flagged 3 numeric_inconsistent WARNs (D7-page_320-0001/0002/0003) on table header row cells 2進数/10進数/16進数. These jp cells contain digit characters (2, 10, 16) while zh/en use spelled-out translations (二进制/Binary number etc.). This is correct transliteration: numeric digits are expanded to language-appropriate terminology. Not a real inconsistency.
findings.correction_suggestion: Detector should whitelist number-system term headers; no content change needed.

findings.description: Pipeline flagged glossary_lock_missed (D9-page_320-0002) for 基数変換. def.en uses 'radix conversion' (lowercase, in quotes) while glossary locked surface is 'Radix Conversion' (title-case). The term appears but is not rendered in the locked capitalised form.
findings.correction_suggestion: Change def.en '"radix conversion"' to '"Radix Conversion"' to match glossary lock.

findings.description: Pipeline flagged glossary_lock_missed (D9-page_320-0001) for 2進数 in p320::0 definition. The jp definition discusses 'radix' (基数) and references 2-decimal-16 notation systems but does not specifically mention '2進数' as a term concept. The en definition does not contain 'Binary number' because the entity is defining 基数 (radix), not 2進数. False positive.
findings.correction_suggestion: Detector refinement: check for semantic relevance before flagging glossary lock; no content change needed.

findings.description: def.en translates 自助努力 as 'self-help efforts'. 自助努力 = self-driven / own initiative. 'Self-help' in English connotes personal development / self-help books genre, which is tangential. Meaning is not wrong but phrasing is unusual for a business/IT context.
findings.correction_suggestion: Consider 'through their own efforts' or 'through self-driven initiatives' for clearer register.

findings.description: All 14 term entities in this chunk have empty term.jp / term.zh / term.en fields (headword label). Definition content is present and correct. Confirmed dataset-wide pattern (checked p50, p100, p200 - same). Either headword extraction was not implemented or is stored elsewhere. Does not affect definition display but prevents headword indexing.
findings.correction_suggestion: If headword labels are required for glossary indexing or UI display, populate from definition first-sentence noun phrase. If empty-label is by pipeline design, document and close.

notes: All 6 question answer_index values verified correct against IT/governance domain knowledge.
Radix conversion table (p320) mathematically verified: all 17 binary/decimal/hex rows correct.
Binary and hexadecimal progression tables (p319) correct.
Internal control framework content (p312-314) aligned with COSO and J-SOX definitions.
p320 stage6_verdict=WARN confirmed: 3 false-positive numeric flags + 2 glossary-lock INFOs.
No domain confusion found (Security vs Safety, hash types, RAID levels not present in this chunk).
Chapter break p317 (基礎理論とアルゴリズム): correct trilingual rendering.
